reason: Added gatk IndexFeatureFile loop before SVCluster command to index intermediate VCFs that lack .tbi indexes. HealthOmics FUSE does not auto-co-locate .tbi files for intermediate outputs.
upstream_behavior: SVCluster assumes .tbi indexes are co-located with input VCFs
healthomics_behavior: Intermediate VCFs from FormatVcf/JoinVcfs lack .tbi indexes; SVCluster fails with missing index error

reason: Bumped SVCluster default memory from 3.75 GiB to 8 GiB. Default is insufficient for cohort-level clustering.
healthomics_behavior: SVCluster OOMs at 3.75 GiB with 10-sample cohort VCFs
